title: Accessibility
drDigitalIntro:
Accessibility settings make your computer easier to use for everyone.
• Make text bigger if it's hard to read.
• Turn on Bold Text for easier reading.
• These settings help people with different needs use computers comfortably.

playgroundTask.goal: You made text larger and bolder

steps.say: Drag the Text Size slider to make text bigger (at least 120%).
Now turn on Bold Text — notice how all the text gets heavier.

drDigitalSuccess: Look at that bigger, bolder text! Accessibility settings help everyone use computers more comfortably.
drDigitalHint: Click Accessibility, then drag the Text Size slider to the right and turn on Bold Text.
